subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of Him Who maketh mention of God with His tongue from eventide unto dawn, and from the break of day doth cause to flow forth [3.5s]... ...Soon, will the present-day order be rolled up, and a new one spread out in its stead
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الذی یذکر الله بلسانه من العشی الی الاشراق و من الاشراق یجری
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
